_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to analyze strategic guidance for issues requiring clarification and/or additional guidance.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in interpreting regulatory text, supervisory guidance, and enforcement decisions, translating legal requirements into operational controls and measurable organizational obligations.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-009 (DG, cosine: 0.533), AB-S-004 (AB, cosine: 0.528).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.581). Shared vocabulary: [guidance, skill]. DCWF-only terms [additional, analyze, clarification, issues, requiring, strategic] vs WIDAI-only terms [controls, decisions, enforcement, interpreting, legal, measurable] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.870, R=0.865). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Skill to analyze strategic guidance for issues requiring clarification and/or ad" and "Skill in interpreting regulatory text, supervisory guidance, and enforcement dec" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.569 ≈ STS 0.581 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [guidance, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [guidance, skill]. DCWF-only: [additional, analyze, clarification, issues, requiring, strategic]. WIDAI-only: [controls, decisions, enforcement, interpreting, legal, measurable].
